name: Dictation review-failed 'Skip' only flips a ref; doesn't record/finish
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-08] Skip doesn't record/finish — user must hunt for 'I'm done'. Fix: relabel or wire to the done path.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: on dictation review failure, the alert Skip action only sets reviewCancelledRef.current = true; it neither records/finishes the dictation nor makes clear that the user must use the separate done path. Variant: single variant, review request rejects and the user presses Skip. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/dictation/complete.test.tsx mocks review failure and presses Skip, failing without the fix and passing only when Skip either routes/wires to the intended done/finish behavior or is relabeled so it no longer implies completion.
